prompt.description: Text description of the video content to generate.

duration.description: Video length in seconds. Max 10 when video_reference_base is specified.

mode.description: Quality mode. RESOLUTION_720 for 720p, RESOLUTION_1080 for 1080p.

width.description: Video width in pixels. Must match a supported dimension pair.

height.description: Video height in pixels. Must match a supported dimension pair.

motion_has_audio.description: Whether to generate audio. Note: audio is NOT kept when editing a video reference.

public.description: Whether the generated video is public.

guidances.start_frame.description: Start frame image. Cannot coexist with image_reference or video_reference_base.

guidances.end_frame.description: End frame image. Requires start_frame. Cannot coexist with image_reference or video_reference_base.

guidances.image_reference.description: Reference images for style/content guidance. Cannot coexist with start_frame or end_frame. Can coexist with video_reference_base.

guidances.video_reference_base.description: Existing video to edit. Can coexist with image_reference (video editing). Cannot coexist with start_frame or end_frame.

rules: VIDEO model — duration is 3-15 seconds. Max 10s when video_reference_base is used.
DO NOT set style — not available for video models.
DO NOT set negativePrompt — not available for this model.
DO NOT set prompt_enhance — not available for this model.
MUTUAL EXCLUSION — pick ONE guidance mode:
Mode A: start_frame + optional end_frame (image-to-video, 2+3 excluded)
Mode B: image_reference alone (style/content guidance, no frames)
Mode C: video_reference_base + optional image_reference (video editing)
start_frame/end_frame CANNOT combine with image_reference or video_reference_base.
video_reference_base CAN combine with image_reference for video editing.
When start_frame is set and width/height are omitted, dimensions auto-match the start_frame image.
3 aspect ratios × 2 resolutions = 6 valid dimension combos.
motion_has_audio: set true for music videos. Audio is NOT kept when editing via video_reference_base.
Default mode is RESOLUTION_1080 (1080p). Use 720p only for fast previews.
